title: arrhenatherum elatius f. bulbosum
intro: Arrhenatherum elatius f. bulbosum, also known as a bulbous false oat-grass, is a perennial grass plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum elatius f. bulbosum include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health concerns.
